attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Database memory utilization critical

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL
    AND bdb_memory_limit IS NOT NULL
    AND bdb_memory_limit > 0
| STATS
    avg_used = AVG(bdb_used_memory),
    avg_limit = AVG(bdb_memory_limit)
  BY bdb, cluster
| EVAL utilization_pct = ROUND(avg_used / avg_limit * 100, 2)
// Alert when memory utilization exceeds 90%
// For non-caching workloads, exceeding the limit causes OOM rejections
// For caching workloads with eviction policies, higher utilization is expected —
// consider raising this threshold or disabling for cache-only databases
| WHERE utilization_pct > 90
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
